data.name: GenericError
data.value: An error occurred.

data.name: OperationCancelled
data.value: The operation was cancelled.

data.name: DbConflict
data.value: The request could not be completed due to a conflict with an existing resource.

data.name: ProfilesError.ProfileNotFound
data.value: Profile not found.

data.name: ProfilesError.EmailAlreadyRegistered
data.value: Email address {0} is already registered.

data.name: ProfilesError.InvalidProfileData
data.value: Invalid profile data provided.

data.name: ProfilesError.OperationCancelled
data.value: Profile operation was cancelled.

data.name: ProfilesError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during profile operation.

data.name: ProfilesError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Profiles.

data.name: Agronomic.PlotNotFound
data.value: The specified plot was not found.

data.name: Agronomic.UnauthorizedAccess
data.value: The authenticated user does not own the requested plot.

data.name: Agronomic.PlotInactive
data.value: Only active plots can be modified.

data.name: Agronomic.PlotConflict
data.value: A plot with the same name already exists for this user.

data.name: Agronomic.DeleteActivePlot
data.value: The plot cannot be deleted under the current deletion policy.

data.name: Agronomic.DeviceNotFound
data.value: The specified IoT device was not found.

data.name: Agronomic.PlanNotFound
data.value: The specified dynamic nutrition plan was not found.

data.name: Agronomic.InvalidState
data.value: The operation is invalid for the current state of the aggregate.

data.name: Agronomic.InvalidInput
data.value: The provided input was invalid.

data.name: Agronomic.CertificationError
data.value: Failed to certify the dynamic nutrition plan.

data.name: Agronomic.GenerationError
data.value: Failed to generate the dynamic nutrition plan.

data.name: Agronomic.AgronomicStatisticsAccess
data.value: The authenticated user cannot access statistics from another user.

data.name: Agronomic.PlotOwnership
data.value: The authenticated user does not own the requested plot.

data.name: Agronomic.QueryError
data.value: An error occurred while executing the agronomic query.

data.name: Agronomic.TileNotFound
data.value: The requested NDVI tile could not be fetched.

data.name: Agronomic.PlotNotLinked
data.value: The plot is not linked to AgroMonitoring.

data.name: Agronomic.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Agronomic.
